title: Bee GUI
description: This mod lets you inspect your bee hives and nests without breaking them open.
body:
![Bee GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d217333e0afcca8d54ad16c794b758561542e5d0.gif)
FEATURES
Bee Inspection GUIA compact panel showing all bees currently inside any Bee Hive or Bee Nest
Bee IconsEach of the 3 slots displays the correct bee variant (normal, baby, carrying nectar, or baby carrying nectar)
Health DisplayA custom durability bar overlays each bee slot
Honey Level BarA visual 5-segment bar shows how much honey the hive has accumulated
TooltipsHover a bee slot to see its name, whether it has nectar, and its exact HP. Hover the honey bar to see the numeric level
HOW TO USE
- ![Shift](https://img.shields.io/badge/Shift-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff)![+](https://img.shields.io/badge/+-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff)![Right Click](https://img.shields.io/badge/Right%20Click-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff) a Bee Hive or Bee Nest while holding nothing or any item. - The Bee GUI panel opens showing the bees inside and the current honey level. - Hover over a bee slot to see its name, nectar status, and HP. - Hover over the honey bar to see the exact level. - Press ![Esc](https://img.shields.io/badge/Esc-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff) or ![E](https://img.shields.io/badge/E-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff) to close. The panel stays open and refreshes live. You can watch the bee count and honey level change in real time.
REQUIREMENTS
* Fabric Loader * Fabric API
CLIENT & SERVER
Some functionality exists on both the client and server, requiring the mod to be installed on both sides.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: * Leaving a rating/review * Sharing it with friends * Reporting any bugs you find
GALLERY
Honey Tooltip ![Honey Tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a36e3a8052002a8a252600cae8f635509f031fd_0.webp) Bee Tooltip ![Bee Tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ef20bfb04171757d8035b3e8f40b9d6bb020ac1_0.webp)
